# Sticker

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Sticker;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Sticker { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
reaction, emotion, smile, happy, feedback

## Categories
social

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/sticker)
